case_title: DAVID RAMIREZ VS. CLAUDIA INES KUNA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KUNA, CLAUDIA INES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF DAVID RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CLAUDIA INES KUNA AND ERIKA INES GONCALVES ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KUNA, CLAUDIA INES
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONCALVES, ERIKA INES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, DAVID ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVER>) SERVED NOV-21-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONCALVES, ERIKA INES
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM ***GRANTED***
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY RAMIREZ, DAVID KUNA, CLAUDIA INES GONCALVES, ERIKA INES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT KUNA, CLAUDIA INES GONCALVES, ERIKA INES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVER>) SERVED NOV-21-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUNA, CLAUDIA INES
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED***
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.
